sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103774" key="thquna/kion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηθυνάκιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τήθυον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope> </bibl> (<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηθύνια</orth> Meineke, Kaibel; but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τήθυα, κτένια</foreign> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Ahrens</placeName>) is prob. cj.).</entryFree>
